channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: China Fueling U.S. Data Center Resistance, AI Groups Claim
item.description: The AI industry, facing scrutiny over jobs and energy costs, accuses China-linked actors of using social media to stir opposition.

item.title: The official quietly leading Trump's science and tech agenda
item.description: Energy undersecretary Darío Gil is taking a long-term view of science and technology.

item.title: What's in the Trump administration's gun deregulation push
item.description: The administration is undertaking the broadest firearm deregulation in years, including allowing handgun shipments.

item.title: Senate advances ICE funding through Trump's second term
item.description: Senate Republicans advanced ICE and Border Patrol funding through the end of Trump's second term.
